subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh on this Day is, verily, the Hidden Treasure Which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق الیوم انه لهو الکنز المخزون الذی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of the Manifestation of God
